name: Core Credit Solutions Inc
description_short: Los Angeles-based credit repair company with 25+ years of experience specializing in removing negative items, collections, and inaccuracies from credit reports.
description_long:
Core Credit Solutions is a credit repair firm headquartered in Los Angeles that has operated for over 25 years. The company focuses exclusively on credit repair services and positions itself as a local expert in the LA market, emphasizing personalized service and transparency in their approach.

The company offers a range of credit repair services centered on identifying and removing negative items from credit reports. Their specific offerings include collection removal, late payment removal, bankruptcy removal, charge-off removal, debt validation, statute of limitations (SOL) research, and general negative item removal. They also provide credit rebuilding guidance and claim to leverage partnerships to enhance their credit improvement results.

Core Credit Solutions distinguishes itself through claims of transparency and honest dealings, with testimonials specifically contrasting the company against typical perceptions of credit repair scams. The company emphasizes a methodical approach: identifying concerning aspects of credit reports, challenging inaccuracies, analyzing core problems, and correcting past issues. They market competitive pricing and offer free consultations to prospective clients.

While the website presents compelling testimonials and a professional operation, consumers should note that credit repair outcomes are highly variable and dependent on the accuracy of items on individual credit reports. The company makes broad claims about how "many negative items can easily be removed quickly," which warrants healthy skepticism—not all negative items can be legally disputed, and results are never guaranteed. Prospective clients should verify licensing, understand the specific dispute process, and confirm all legal compliance before engaging services.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 25+ years of established operating history specifically in credit repair
Offers free initial consultation to assess credit situation
Provides state-specific statute of limitations research for debt validation
Includes credit rebuilding guidance alongside dispute services, not just removal
Testimonials cite relief from debt collector calls and transparent staff communication
Emphasizes tailored solutions based on individual credit report analysis
Claims involvement in credit partnerships to enhance improvement outcomes
cons: Website contains vague claims like 'remove negative items quickly' without explaining legal limitations on what can be disputed
Makes broad statements ('thousands of clients') without verifiable metrics or average results data
No pricing transparency provided on website; requires contact for cost information
Testimonials are anecdotal; no independent third-party verification or ratings provided
As a for-profit credit repair company, inherent conflict of interest compared to non-profit credit counseling
best_for: Los Angeles-area residents with multiple negative items on credit reports seeking local in-person consultation
Consumers experiencing debt collector contact who need guidance on validation and removal strategies
Individuals with past financial hardship (late payments, collections, charge-offs) wanting professional dispute assistance
People skeptical of credit repair but seeking transparent, established local provider
diagnosis: Core Credit Solutions is best for Los Angeles residents with accurate negative items on their credit reports who want professional dispute assistance from an established local firm. The primary caveat is that credit repair results depend entirely on whether items are legally inaccurate or outdated—legitimate negative items cannot be removed, and claims of removing items 'quickly' should be verified against realistic timelines and individual eligibility.
services: Late payment removal from credit reports
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 9415 Culver Blvd Suite 042, Culver City, CA 90232
